title: Andro's Palette
description: A Block Expansion Mod for Minecraft that adds things like Stained Planks, Bricks and more!
body:
![Andro's Palette](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3684ad7f340040b436ac2238f938f00aa0d9aa2f.png)

________________________________________________________________________________________________

What is this Mod About?

Andro's Palette aims to expand Block Palettes for Building by adding things like Painted Bricks & Planks, while staying true to Vanilla Minecraft's Style, and being Survival Friendly!

Where to follow development!

You can follow Development on the [Trello](https://trello.com/b/sCwGPDQH/andros-development-workshop)! Sneak Peaks will also be shared in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/nwayG7TQfx)!

Where to report bugs and suggest new features!

CurseForge comments don't work to great for these things, there are dedicated channels for reporting Bugs and Suggesting features in the Discord!
